items.title: Robust Fusion of Object-Level V2X for Learned 3D Object Detection
items.summary: This paper explores integrating V2X communication into 3D object detection to enhance robustness against real-world conditions.
items.why_matters: Improving object detection in automated driving can enhance safety and reliability in autonomous systems.
items.connection: The focus on V2X communication and robust perception aligns with Prof. Liu's interests in latency-critical perception pipelines and autonomous driving.

items.student_project: The integration of V2X information into perception systems could align with student projects on sensing and multimodal fusion at the edge.
items.rationale: Strong relevance to safety-critical perception in autonomous systems.

items.title: Per-Platform GPIO Overhead in Hardware-Validated Edge ML Inference Timing

items.title: Tempus: A Temporally Scalable Resource-Invariant GEMM Streaming Framework for Versal AI Edge
items.summary: Tempus is a scalable GEMM framework for efficient edge AI deployment on AMD Versal SoCs, achieving low-latency and resource-efficient inference.

items.title: BOLT: Online Lightweight Adaptation for Preparation-Free Heterogeneous Cooperative Perception
items.summary: BOLT is a lightweight module for preparation-free heterogeneous cooperative perception using ego-as-teacher distillation.

items.connection: This work aligns with Prof. Liu's interests in latency-critical perception pipelines and collaborative computing for autonomy.

summary.headline: Advancements in V2X and Edge AI for Robust Perception
summary.tldr: Today's research highlights the integration of V2X communication in 3D object detection and the development of scalable edge AI frameworks. Papers like 'Robust Fusion of Object-Level V2X' and 'Tempus' showcase efforts to enhance real-time perception in safety-critical applications.
